title: Limit Use of Portable Storage Devices on External Systems
description: limit use of portable storage devices on external systems

checks.name: Limits on Portable Storage Device Use on External Systems are Defined
checks.purpose: Definition of limits on portable storage device use containing CUI on external systems is an organizational GRC documentation concern documented in removable media and acceptable use policies and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Use of Portable Storage Devices Containing CUI on External Systems is Limited
checks.purpose: Verify that removable storage device write access is restricted via Group Policy registry, BitLocker To Go is required for removable drives, and AutoPlay is disabled to prevent unauthorized data transfer from external portable storage

checks.name: Limits on Portable Storage Device Use on External Systems are Defined
checks.purpose: Definition of limits on portable storage device use is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Use of Portable Storage Devices Containing CUI on External Systems is Limited
checks.purpose: Verify that all removable storage devices are denied write access via Group Policy, AutoPlay and AutoRun are disabled, and device installation restrictions prevent unauthorized portable storage connections on the server

checks.name: Limits on Portable Storage Device Use on External Systems are Defined
checks.purpose: Definition of limits on portable storage device use is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Use of Portable Storage Devices Containing CUI on External Systems is Limited
checks.purpose: Verify that USB storage devices are restricted via USBGuard or udev rules, removable media automount is disabled, and any mounted removable media requires explicit authorization

checks.name: Limits on Portable Storage Device Use on External Systems are Defined
checks.purpose: Definition of limits on portable storage device use is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

checks.name: Use of Portable Storage Devices Containing CUI on External Systems is Limited
checks.purpose: Verify that USB storage devices are restricted via USBGuard or udev rules, removable media automount is disabled, and any mounted removable media requires explicit authorization

remediation: On Windows, restrict removable storage device usage via Group Policy under Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > System > Removable Storage Access. Set All Removable Storage Classes: Deny all access to prevent unauthorized use. Require BitLocker To Go encryption on any organization-issued removable drives before write access is permitted, and disable AutoPlay and AutoRun via Group Policy. On Linux, install and configure USBGuard to whitelist only approved USB storage devices by vendor and product ID. Disable automount of removable media and configure udev rules to block unauthorized removable storage. Maintain an inventory of approved portable storage devices.
